title: Grevillea polychroma
taxonomy: Grevillea polychroma is a species of flowering plant in the family Proteaceae. It is native to Western Australia and is commonly known as the many-hued grevillea. The plant is a member of the large and diverse genus Grevillea, which comprises over 360 species. Grevillea polychroma is a shrub with bright yellow and red flowers, making it a popular choice for gardeners in warm climates. The plant's classification is further supported by its unique characteristics and distribution within the Proteaceae family.
